overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The clip transitions from a vibrant neon-lit plaza featuring 'The HEART' club with a distinctive green geometric roof structure, through dark industrial underpasses and underground passages with graffiti and debris, ending in a narrow alley approaching a figure standing in light.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the vibrant neon plaza toward the overpass structure ahead

entered.detail: large triangular glass and metal framework with green neon illumination
illuminated signage for The HEART club with cursive neon lettering
large abstract red sculptural installation near the club entrance
multiple colorful digital billboards and advertisements on building facades
raised concrete highway structure spanning across the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide neon-lit plaza at night, dominated by The HEART club's distinctive green geometric roof structure and red sculptural installation. Bright neon billboards illuminate the left side while an elevated highway overpass looms ahead. The camera walks forward across paved tiles toward the darker area under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: entering the dark shadow of the overpass, neon lights fade to dim ambient lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive concrete overpass into darker industrial territory

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillars and beams of the highway structure overhead
weathered concrete industrial building facade with minimal lighting
temporary metal fencing and barriers along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into the shadowy space beneath the highway overpass, where massive concrete beams dominate the view. The vibrant neon colors give way to dim, moody lighting with industrial concrete walls on the left and metal barriers on the right. The environment becomes enclosed and darker as the camera progresses deeper under the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underground passage with construction debris

events.description: passing stacked concrete pipes and graffiti-covered walls in the industrial passage

agents.ego_description: navigating through dark industrial passages scattered with debris and construction materials

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete drainage pipes stacked horizontally
wall with prominent blue graffiti reading DIE DIE
thick bundles of industrial cables and wiring hanging overhead
warm orange glow emanating from industrial openings or fires in the distance

segments.scene_description: The passage becomes increasingly industrial and cluttered, with stacked concrete pipes and graffiti-covered walls appearing on the right. Thick cable bundles hang overhead while distant orange lighting provides the only illumination in the enclosed underground space. The ground is littered with rubble and construction debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with figure standing in light

events.description: figure becomes visible standing in illuminated doorway at the end of the narrow alley

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow alley toward a figure standing in the light ahead

notable_agents.action: standing still in the illuminated doorway at the end of the alley

entered.detail: tight concrete corridor walls closing in on both sides
bright light source at the end of the dark alley marking an exit or entrance

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a claustrophobic narrow alley with concrete walls pressing in from both sides. A figure stands silhouetted against a bright illuminated doorway at the far end. As the camera approaches, the figure remains stationary, creating a focal point in the otherwise dark and confined passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a vibrant, neon-lit urban plaza into the oppressive darkness of a claustrophobic industrial alley. It begins in a wide open space dominated by the green geometric roof of The HEART club and bright billboards, moving steadily across paved tiles toward a looming highway overpass. As the camera passes beneath the structure, the vivid colors fade into a moody, enclosed environment of massive concrete beams and dim industrial lighting. The scene then shifts into a cluttered underground passage where graffiti-covered walls and hanging cable bundles replace the open city air, with the ground becoming littered with rubble and debris. Finally, the path narrows into a tight concrete alley, drawing the camera toward a solitary figure silhouetted against a bright doorway at the far end.
